deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'echo "PORT=$PORT" && python manage.py wait_for_db --timeout 90 && python manage.py migrate --noinput && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput --clear && exec gunicorn config.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:${PORT:-8080} --workers 3 --timeout 60 --max-requests 1000 --max-requests-jitter 100'
